_comment: Dreamer-Lite — Pure img2img fallback. NO custom nodes required.
_description: Zero-dependency workflow. Uses only built-in ComfyUI nodes. Lower identity preservation but always works.
_when_to_use: If IPAdapter installation fails, or on very constrained hardware (< 4 GB VRAM)

_meta.title: ③ Encode to Latent Space
_meta._note: This encodes the input image into the latent space where diffusion happens.

inputs.text: portrait photograph of a person, with a gentle warm smile, natural expression, studio lighting, sharp focus, photorealistic skin, 85mm lens

_meta.title: ⑤ Positive Prompt  ← EDIT EXPRESSION HERE
_meta._tip: Change 'gentle warm smile' to any expression you want

inputs.text: deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, low quality, watermark, extra limbs, cartoon

_meta.title: ⑦ KSampler  [denoise=0.55]
_meta._note: denoise controls how much to change: 0.4=subtle, 0.55=balanced, 0.75=dramatic
